prompt: Create a soft, highly detailed anime-style illustration of a young soap-bubble elf woman with long shimmering silver-lavender hair and pointed ears lounging sideways on a beige sofa in a cozy Japanese apartment living room. She is barefoot with her knees bent, wearing a loose off-shoulder white shirt and pale blue drawstring shorts, holding a silver smartphone in one hand and looking down at it, while a flat opaque taupe square deliberately obscures her face. Her exposed skin and hair are covered in a glossy transparent soap-film sheen, with rainbow iridescent highlights like thin bubbles stretched over her body, especially across her shoulders, arms, legs, chest, and flowing hair. Surround her with exactly 18 floating soap bubbles of different sizes, including one large bubble near the upper left, one large partial bubble in the lower right foreground, one large bubble near the bottom center foreground, several small bubbles around her hair and the room, and a few partial bubbles at the image edges; every bubble should have prismatic reflections. The setting is a warm late-afternoon domestic living room in Jozankei, Japan, with a low round table holding a white mug and a folded newspaper or magazine, a floor heater against the wall, a small kitchen visible through an open doorway, wooden trim, framed wall art, potted plants, pale curtains, a dining table in the background, and travel magazines or books stacked on the floor in the foreground with subtle Japanese text. Use gentle sunlight from the right, muted beige and gray tones, realistic room perspective, delicate painterly rendering, luminous iridescence, dreamy atmosphere, shallow depth of field, and a polished GPT-image-2 anime art finish.
